title: Verify timeout middleware implementation
description: Verified that src/middleware/timeout-middleware.ts exists with a createTimeoutMiddleware factory that aborts requests exceeding configured timeout (default 30s), attaches X-Request-Timeout header on timeout, and returns 504. Tests in src/middleware/timeout-middleware.test.ts pass (20 tests). Middleware is exported from src/middleware/index.ts. Pattern follows existing middleware chain style from request-logger.ts.
existing_patterns: src/middleware/request-logger.ts - Express-style chainable middleware pattern with factory function and config object
src/middleware/rate-limiter.ts - similar factory pattern with excludePaths and shared state
